title: AN ACT NAMING THE NATIONAL ROAD FROM THE INTERSECTION OF GOVERNOR CAMINS ROAD AND VETERANS AVENUE UP TO LICOMO IN THE CITY OF ZAMBOANGA TO MARIA CLARA L. LOBREGAT HIGHWAY

chunks.text:
H. No. 6651 / 100 OG No. 29, 4683 (July 19, 2004)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9270, March 19, 2004 ]

AN ACT NAMING THE NATIONAL ROAD FROM THE INTERSECTION OF GOVERNOR CAMINS ROAD AND VETERANS AVENUE UP TO LICOMO IN THE CITY OF ZAMBOANGA TO MARIA CLARA L. LOBREGAT HIGHWAY

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The portion of the national road starting from the intersection of Governor Camins Road and Veterans Avenue up to Licomo in the City of Zamboanga is hereby named Mana Clara L. Lobregat Highway.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

FRANKLIN M. DRILON

(Sgd.)

JOSE DE VENECIA JR

.

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 21, 2004 and January 19, 2004, respectively.

(Sgd.)

OSCAR G. YABES

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: MAR 19 2004

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

President of the Philippines
